=mkdir -p "/data/cases/{{$json.case_id}}/03_analysis/scoring_batches" && printf '%s' '{{$json.scoring_batch_b64}}' | base64 -d > "/data/cases/{{$json.case_id}}/03_analysis/scoring_batches/{{$json.batch_id}}.json" && python - <<'PY'
import json

print(json.dumps({
    "case_id": "{{$json.case_id}}",
    "batch_id": "{{$json.batch_id}}",
    "saved_path": "/data/cases/{{$json.case_id}}/03_analysis/scoring_batches/{{$json.batch_id}}.json"
}, ensure_ascii=False))

=python - <<'PY'
import json
import base64
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime

def discover_case_id():
    root = Path("/data/cases")
    candidates = []

    if not root.exists():
        return ""

    for case_dir in root.iterdir():
        if not case_dir.is_dir():
            continue

        batches_dir = case_dir / "03_analysis" / "scoring_batches"
        batch_files = list(batches_dir.glob("batch_*.json"))

        if not batch_files:
            continue

        latest_mtime = max(p.stat().st_mtime for p in batch_files)
        candidates.append({
            "case_id": case_dir.name,
            "batch_count": len(batch_files),
            "latest_mtime": latest_mtime
        })

    if not candidates:
        return ""

    candidates.sort(key=lambda x: (x["latest_mtime"], x["batch_count"]), reverse=True)
    return candidates[0]["case_id"]

case_id = "{{$json.case_id}}".strip()

if not case_id:
    case_id = discover_case_id()

if not case_id:
    raise Exception("No se pudo determinar case_id. No se encontraron scoring_batches en /data/cases/*/03_analysis/scoring_batches.")

base = Path("/data/cases") / case_id
analysis_dir = base / "03_analysis"
batches_dir = analysis_dir / "scoring_batches"

analysis_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

batch_files = sorted(batches_dir.glob("batch_*.json"))

all_evaluations = []
followups = []
monitoring_followups = []

for path in batch_files:
    try:
        data = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    except Exception:
        continue

    for ev in data.get("question_evaluations", []):
        ev["_source_batch"] = path.name
        all_evaluations.append(ev)

        try:
            score = int(ev.get("score"))
        except Exception:
            score = None

        requires_followup = ev.get("requires_provider_followup") is True

        if score != 2 and not requires_followup:
            continue

        question_id = ev.get("question_id", "")
        score_type = ev.get("score_type", "insufficient_evidence")

        reason = (
            ev.get("decision_reason")
            or ev.get("reason")
            or ev.get("analysis_reason")
            or ev.get("answer_summary")
            or "La respuesta requiere aclaración o evidencia adicional."
        )

        questions = ev.get("followup_questions") or []

        if isinstance(questions, str):
            questions = [questions]

        if not questions:
            if score_type == "partial_compliance":
                questions = [
                    "¿Podéis confirmar el alcance de la medida, los componentes cubiertos y aportar evidencia/documentación que lo respalde?"
                ]
            elif score_type == "ambiguous_answer":
                questions = [
                    "¿Podéis aclarar si el control está actualmente implantado, en planificación o no aplica al servicio?"
                ]
            else:
                questions = [
                    "¿Podéis aportar evidencia o documentación que confirme la configuración indicada y su alcance?"
                ]

        item = {
            "question_id": question_id,
            "score": score,
            "score_type": score_type,
            "reason": reason,
            "question_to_provider": questions[0],
            "all_questions_to_provider": questions,
            "required": True,
            "source_batch": ev.get("_source_batch", "")
        }

        if question_id in {"Q_037", "Q_038", "Q_039", "Q_040"}:
            monitoring_followups.append(item)
        else:
            followups.append(item)

# Agrupación especial Q_037-Q_040: Monitorización / Logs / SIEM / Alertas
if monitoring_followups:
    involved_ids = sorted({f["question_id"] for f in monitoring_followups})

    reasons = []
    for f in monitoring_followups:
        reasons.append(f"{f['question_id']}: {f['reason']}")

    followups.append({
        "question_id": "Q_037-Q_040",
        "score": 2,
        "score_type": "insufficient_evidence",
        "reason": (
            "Se requiere aclaración conjunta sobre la capacidad de monitorización, recogida de logs, "
            "centralización en SIEM y generación de alertas. "
            + " | ".join(reasons)
        ),
        "question_to_provider": (
            "Respecto a monitorización y gestión de eventos de seguridad: "
            "¿podéis confirmar si se recogen logs de usuarios, administradores, servidores, bases de datos y dispositivos de red; "
            "si dichos logs se centralizan en un SIEM propio o pueden enviarse al SIEM de EMPRESA; "
            "y si existen alertas de seguridad configuradas para detectar incidentes? "
            "Por favor, indicad alcance, herramientas utilizadas, tipos de logs incluidos, retención, periodicidad y evidencias disponibles."
        ),
        "all_questions_to_provider": [
            "¿Se recogen logs de operaciones y accesos realizados por usuarios finales y operadores del servicio?",
            "¿Los logs se centralizan en un SIEM propio u otra herramienta equivalente?",
            "¿Existe posibilidad de enviar los logs al SIEM de EMPRESA?",
            "¿Existen alertas de seguridad configuradas para detectar y escalar posibles incidentes?",
            "¿Podéis aportar evidencia de configuración, alcance, retención y ejemplos de alertas?"
        ],
        "required": True,
        "source_batch": ",".join(sorted({f["source_batch"] for f in monitoring_followups})),
        "grouped_questions": involved_ids
    })

has_followups = len(followups) > 0

scoring_preliminary = {
    "case_id": case_id,
    "status": "PRELIMINARY_SCORING_DONE",
    "created_at": datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds"),
    "batch_files_found": [p.name for p in batch_files],
    "total_batches": len(batch_files),
    "total_evaluations": len(all_evaluations),
    "question_evaluations": all_evaluations
}

scoring_path = analysis_dir / "scoring_preliminary.json"
scoring_path.write_text(
    json.dumps(scoring_preliminary, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
    encoding="utf-8"
)

followups_pending = {
    "case_id": case_id,
    "status": "WAITING_PROVIDER_FOLLOWUP" if has_followups else "NO_FOLLOWUPS_REQUIRED",
    "followup_round": 1,
    "created_at": datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds"),
    "followup_count": len(followups),
    "questions": followups
}

followups_path = analysis_dir / "followups_pending.json"
followups_path.write_text(
    json.dumps(followups_pending, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
    encoding="utf-8"
)

status = {
    "case_id": case_id,
    "status": "WAITING_PROVIDER_FOLLOWUP" if has_followups else "READY_FOR_FINAL_ANALYSIS",
    "updated_at": datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds"),
    "has_followups": has_followups,
    "followup_count": len(followups),
    "total_batches": len(batch_files),
    "total_evaluations": len(all_evaluations),
    "scoring_batches_dir": str(batches_dir)
}

case_status_path = analysis_dir / "case_status.json"
case_status_path.write_text(
    json.dumps(status, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
    encoding="utf-8"
)

email_lines = [
    "Buenas,",
    "",
    f"Durante el análisis del cuestionario de seguridad del proyecto {case_id}, necesitamos aclarar algunos puntos para poder completar la evaluación.",
    "",
    "Por favor, responded manteniendo el identificador de cada pregunta.",
    ""
]

for f in followups:
    email_lines.append(f"{f['question_id']} - Aclaración requerida")
    email_lines.append(f"Motivo: {f['reason']}")
    email_lines.append(f"Pregunta: {f['question_to_provider']}")
    email_lines.append("")

email_lines.append("Gracias.")

email_body = "\n".join(email_lines)
email_body_b64 = base64.b64encode(email_body.encode("utf-8")).decode("ascii")

print(json.dumps({
    "case_id": case_id,
    "has_followups": has_followups,
    "followup_count": len(followups),
    "total_batches": len(batch_files),
    "total_evaluations": len(all_evaluations),
    "status": status["status"],
    "followups_pending_path": str(followups_path),
    "scoring_preliminary_path": str(scoring_path),
    "case_status_path": str(case_status_path),
    "email_subject": f"[Follow-up] {case_id}",
    "email_body": email_body,
    "email_body_b64": email_body_b64
}, ensure_ascii=False))
PY

=python - <<'PY'
import json
import base64
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime

case_id = {{ JSON.stringify($json.case_id) }}
email_subject = {{ JSON.stringify($json.email_subject) }}
email_body_b64 = {{ JSON.stringify($json.email_body_b64) }}
followup_count = int({{ JSON.stringify($json.followup_count) }})

email_body = base64.b64decode(email_body_b64.encode("ascii")).decode("utf-8")

base = Path("/data/cases") / case_id
analysis_dir = base / "03_analysis"
followup_dir = base / "04_followups" / "round_001"

analysis_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
followup_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

followup_email_file = followup_dir / "followup_email_sent.txt"

followup_email_file.write_text(
    email_body,
    encoding="utf-8"
)

status = {
    "case_id": case_id,
    "status": "WAITING_PROVIDER_FOLLOWUP",
    "followup_round": 1,
    "followup_email_prepared_at": datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds"),
    "followup_count": followup_count,
    "followup_email_file": str(followup_email_file)
}

(analysis_dir / "case_status.json").write_text(
    json.dumps(status, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
    encoding="utf-8"
)

print(json.dumps({
    "case_id": case_id,
    "status": "WAITING_PROVIDER_FOLLOWUP",
    "followup_round": 1,
    "followup_count": followup_count,
    "email_subject": email_subject,
    "email_body": email_body,
    "email_body_b64": email_body_b64,
    "followup_email_file": str(followup_email_file)
}, ensure_ascii=False))

=python - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime
from collections import defaultdict

case_id = "{{$json.case_id}}"
scoring_preliminary_path_from_input ="{{$json.scoring_preliminary_path}}"

base = Path("/data/cases") / case_id
analysis_dir = base / "03_analysis"

scoring_preliminary_path = Path(scoring_preliminary_path_from_input)

if not scoring_preliminary_path.exists():
    raise Exception(f"No existe scoring_preliminary.json en: {scoring_preliminary_path}")

preliminary = json.loads(scoring_preliminary_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

final_evaluations = []
warnings = []

for ev in preliminary.get("question_evaluations", []):
    final_ev = dict(ev)

    try:
        score = int(final_ev.get("score"))
    except Exception:
        score = 2

    if score == 2:
        final_ev["score"] = 1
        final_ev["score_type"] = "non_compliance"
        final_ev["generates_finding"] = True
        final_ev["requires_provider_followup"] = False
        final_ev["requires_human_review"] = True
        final_ev["followup_questions"] = []
        final_ev["finalization_warning"] = (
            "Esta pregunta seguía con score=2 en la rama sin follow-up. "
            "Se convierte a score=1 para permitir la generación del informe final."
        )

        warnings.append({
            "type": "unexpected_score_2",
            "question_id": final_ev.get("question_id", ""),
            "description": "Se encontró score=2 en la rama sin follow-up. Se convirtió a score=1."
        })

    elif score == 1:
        final_ev["score"] = 1
        final_ev["score_type"] = "non_compliance"
        final_ev["generates_finding"] = True
        final_ev["requires_provider_followup"] = False
        final_ev["followup_questions"] = []

    elif score == 3:
        final_ev["score"] = 3
        final_ev["generates_finding"] = False
        final_ev["requires_provider_followup"] = False
        final_ev["requires_human_review"] = False
        final_ev["followup_questions"] = []

        final_ev["level"] = "SIN RIESGO"
        final_ev["risk_id"] = ""
        final_ev["risk_name"] = ""
        final_ev["control_ids"] = []
        final_ev["incumplimiento_identificado"] = ""
        final_ev["controles_asociados"] = ""
        final_ev["amenazas"] = []
        final_ev["mitigation"] = ""
        final_ev["mitigation_guide"] = ""
        final_ev["report_context_example"] = ""
        final_ev["report_detail_example"] = ""
        final_ev["tiempo_mitigacion"] = ""

    else:
        final_ev["score"] = 1
        final_ev["score_type"] = "non_compliance"
        final_ev["generates_finding"] = True
        final_ev["requires_provider_followup"] = False
        final_ev["requires_human_review"] = True
        final_ev["followup_questions"] = []
        final_ev["finalization_warning"] = "Score inválido convertido a score=1."

        warnings.append({
            "type": "invalid_score",
            "question_id": final_ev.get("question_id", ""),
            "description": "Score inválido convertido a score=1."
        })

    final_evaluations.append(final_ev)

findings = []

for ev in final_evaluations:
    try:
        score = int(ev.get("score"))
    except Exception:
        score = None

    if score == 1 or ev.get("generates_finding") is True:
        findings.append(ev)

findings_by_level = defaultdict(list)

for finding in findings:
    level = finding.get("level") or "SIN NIVEL"
    findings_by_level[level].append(finding)

summary = {
    "total_evaluations": len(final_evaluations),
    "total_findings": len(findings),
    "alto": len(findings_by_level.get("ALTO", [])),
    "medio": len(findings_by_level.get("MEDIO", [])),
    "bajo": len(findings_by_level.get("BAJO", [])),
    "sin_nivel": len(findings_by_level.get("SIN NIVEL", [])),
    "sin_riesgo": len([ev for ev in final_evaluations if ev.get("score") == 3])
}

scoring_final = {
    "case_id": case_id,
    "status": "FINAL_SCORING_DONE",
    "finalization_type": "NO_FOLLOWUP_REQUIRED",
    "created_at": datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds"),
    "total_evaluations": len(final_evaluations),
    "total_findings": len(findings),
    "warnings": warnings,
    "question_evaluations": final_evaluations
}

risk_analysis = {
    "case_id": case_id,
    "status": "RISK_ANALYSIS_READY",
    "created_at": datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds"),
    "summary": summary,
    "findings": findings,
    "findings_by_level": {
        level: values for level, values in findings_by_level.items()
    }
}

report_data = {
    "case_id": case_id,
    "status": "REPORT_DATA_READY",
    "created_at": datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds"),
    "summary": summary,
    "findings": findings,
    "question_evaluations": final_evaluations,
    "metadata": {
        "source": "scoring_preliminary.json",
        "followup_required": False,
        "finalization_type": "NO_FOLLOWUP_REQUIRED"
    }
}

scoring_final_path = analysis_dir / "scoring_final.json"
risk_analysis_path = analysis_dir / "risk_analysis.json"
report_data_path = analysis_dir / "report_data.json"
case_status_path = analysis_dir / "case_status.json"

scoring_final_path.write_text(
    json.dumps(scoring_final, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
    encoding="utf-8"
)

risk_analysis_path.write_text(
    json.dumps(risk_analysis, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
    encoding="utf-8"
)

report_data_path.write_text(
    json.dumps(report_data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
    encoding="utf-8"
)

case_status = {
    "case_id": case_id,
    "status": "READY_FOR_REPORT",
    "updated_at": datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds"),
    "followup_required": False,
    "total_evaluations": len(final_evaluations),
    "total_findings": len(findings),
    "scoring_final_path": str(scoring_final_path),
    "risk_analysis_path": str(risk_analysis_path),
    "report_data_path": str(report_data_path),
    "warnings": warnings
}

case_status_path.write_text(
    json.dumps(case_status, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
    encoding="utf-8"
)

print(json.dumps({
    "case_id": case_id,
    "status": "READY_FOR_REPORT",
    "followup_required": False,
    "total_evaluations": len(final_evaluations),
    "total_findings": len(findings),
    "scoring_final_path": str(scoring_final_path),
    "risk_analysis_path": str(risk_analysis_path),
    "report_data_path": str(report_data_path),
    "case_status_path": str(case_status_path),
    "warnings_count": len(warnings)
}, ensure_ascii=False))
PY

=mkdir -p "/data/cases/{{$json.case_id}}/04_report" && printf '%s' '{{$json.report_narrative_b64}}' | base64 -d > "/data/cases/{{$json.case_id}}/04_report/report_narrative_ai.json" && python - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime

case_id = "{{$json.case_id}}"

base = Path("/data/cases") / case_id
report_dir = base / "04_report"

pack_path = report_dir / "report_pack.json"
narrative_path = report_dir / "report_narrative_ai.json"
render_path = report_dir / "report_render_data.json"

if not pack_path.exists():
    raise Exception(f"No existe report_pack.json: {pack_path}")

if not narrative_path.exists():
    raise Exception(f"No existe report_narrative_ai.json: {narrative_path}")

pack = json.loads(pack_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
narrative = json.loads(narrative_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

render_data = {
    **pack,
    "narrative": narrative,
    "render_created_at": datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds")
}

render_path.write_text(
    json.dumps(render_data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
    encoding="utf-8"
)

print(json.dumps({
    "case_id": case_id,
    "status": "REPORT_RENDER_DATA_READY",
    "report_render_data_path": str(render_path),
    "report_pack_path": str(pack_path),
    "report_narrative_path": str(narrative_path)
}, ensure_ascii=False))
PY

=case_id="{{$json.case_id}}"
docx_path="{{$json.docx_path}}"

python3 - <<'PY'
import json
import re
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime

case_id = """{{$json.case_id}}""".strip()
docx_path = """{{$json.docx_path}}""".strip()

if not case_id:
    raise Exception("case_id vacío para preparar subida a Google Drive.")

base = Path("/data/cases") / case_id
report_dir = base / "04_report"

report_render_data_path = report_dir / "report_render_data.json"
report_pack_path = report_dir / "report_pack.json"

def load_json(path):
    path = Path(path)
    if not path.exists():
        return {}
    return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

def clean_folder_name(value):
    text = str(value or "").strip()

    if not text:
        text = case_id

    text = re.sub(r'[\\/:*?"<>|]+', "_", text)
    text = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", text).strip()
    text = text.rstrip(". ")

    if len(text) > 100:
        text = text[:100].rstrip(". ")

    if not text:
        text = case_id

    return text

data = load_json(report_render_data_path)
pack = load_json(report_pack_path)

# Nombre descriptivo del proyecto para metadatos.
project_name = (
    data.get("cover", {}).get("proyecto")
    or data.get("project_context_input", {}).get("proyecto")
    or data.get("project_context", {}).get("proyecto")
    or pack.get("cover", {}).get("proyecto")
    or pack.get("project_context_input", {}).get("proyecto")
    or case_id
)

# IMPORTANTE:
# La carpeta de Google Drive se nombra con case_id para que sea única y no dependa
# del texto anonimizado del triaje/informe.
google_project_folder = clean_folder_name(case_id)

if not docx_path:
    report_out_dir = base / "05_report"
    candidates = sorted(
        report_out_dir.glob("Informe_Ciberseguridad_*.docx"),
        key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime,
        reverse=True
    )
    if candidates:
        docx_path = str(candidates[0])

docx = Path(docx_path)

if not docx.exists():
    raise Exception(f"No existe el informe DOCX: {docx}")

questionnaire_file = (
    data.get("sources", {}).get("questionnaire_file")
    or pack.get("sources", {}).get("questionnaire_file")
    or str(base / "01_originales" / "cuestionario.xlsx")
)

questionnaire = Path(questionnaire_file)

if not questionnaire.exists():
    raise Exception(f"No existe el cuestionario original: {questionnaire}")

upload_pack = {
    "case_id": case_id,
    "created_at": datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds"),
    "google_drive_base_folder": "TFM",
    "google_drive_project_folder": google_project_folder,
    "google_drive_project_path": f"TFM/{google_project_folder}",
    "project_name": project_name,
    "folder_name_source": "case_id",
    "files": [
        {
            "kind": "report",
            "file_path": str(docx),
            "file_name": docx.name,
            "mime_type": "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document"
        },
        {
            "kind": "questionnaire",
            "file_path": str(questionnaire),
            "file_name": questionnaire.name,
            "mime_type": "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet"
        }
    ]
}

out_path = report_dir / "google_drive_upload_pack.json"
out_path.write_text(
    json.dumps(upload_pack, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
    encoding="utf-8"
)

print(json.dumps({
    "case_id": case_id,
    "status": "GOOGLE_DRIVE_UPLOAD_PACK_READY",
    "google_drive_base_folder": upload_pack["google_drive_base_folder"],
    "google_drive_project_folder": upload_pack["google_drive_project_folder"],
    "google_drive_project_path": upload_pack["google_drive_project_path"],
    "project_name": project_name,
    "folder_name_source": "case_id",
    "docx_path": str(docx),
    "questionnaire_path": str(questionnaire),
    "upload_pack_path": str(out_path),
    "files": upload_pack["files"]
}, ensure_ascii=False))
PY

nodes.name: Code - Parse Google Drive upload pack

parameters.toolDescription:
OBLIGATORIA. Recupera la ficha oficial del catálogo de riesgos para una pregunta concreta.

Debe usarse antes de evaluar cualquier pregunta.

Entrada esperada: string con formato:
EXACT_QUESTION_ID_Q_XXX Q_XXX texto de la pregunta

Devuelve la ficha oficial con metadata.question_id.

main.node: Code - Parse Google Drive upload pack
